meaning: n.[医]骨发育过度,骨质增生
examples: It can alleviate pain symptom caused by hyperosteogeny (spur), and is very helpful to the recovery.
Including abnormal curvature of cervical vertebrae, hyperosteogeny, narrowing of vertebrae tube and disc height.
Objective To investigate correlation between lumbar vertebrae hyperosteogeny and intervertebral disc bulge or herniation.
